content: 这应该是我第一篇中文的博客吧， 光全是英文的话没什么意思，偶尔换换语言也挺好的。 这一篇主要是想想这个网站该怎么搞，目前为止应该是有很多功能缺失

Yooo! It’s Friday. The happiest day in the week must be Friday, because you’ll have two days for rest and do things whenever you like! :D But I had to take lessons during weekend, not cool, still I can working on with my blog and post some new things up to it. I just misdelated all the files that were used for deploy the blog(That’s why i didn’t post anything

Hi everyone, apparently, this is a blog I have created just now. I’ll post something on it. It could be my daily life, something that I was interested in and so on. If you want to ask me why did I bulid this blog. I will tell you that it is my hobby. I’ll try to keep on daily upload, if I didn’t write anything for so long you can just ping me.

Ohhhhhh! Just received my python level five certificate from Chinese Institute Of Electronics. I cannot express how excited I am to receive this unique certificate. You see, the Python levels certificate from Chinese Institute Of Electronics is divided into six levels and I already made five of them! That means I’ll be “graduate” from python after I get
